hooks.command:
echo '⚠️ CRITICAL INSTRUCTION — READ BEFORE RESPONDING ⚠️

You MUST start your response with 🧠 followed by which frameworks you applied.
This is NON-NEGOTIABLE. If your response does not start with 🧠, it will be rejected.

Classify the user message:
- New idea/feature → Office Hours (6 forcing questions)
- Bug/error → Iron Law (investigate → analyze → hypothesize → implement)
- Options/tradeoffs → Completeness scoring (1-10 each option)
- Scope discussion → CEO Review (EXPAND/SELECTIVE/HOLD/REDUCE)
- About to code → Mega QA pre-coding (consumer-first, adversarial thinking)
- Code done → Mega QA post-coding (re-grep consumers, Serhii test)
- Outbound content → NEO (Marc + Kyle + Brian)
- Product/strategy → Steve (Cagan + Lemkin)
- Triaging bugs → Obsolescence check first (git log before investigating)
- Trivial/mechanical → 🧠 (no framework needed)

Format: 🧠 Framework1 + Framework2
THIS LINE MUST BE THE VERY FIRST THING IN YOUR RESPONSE. NO EXCEPTIONS.'
